_comment: Hand-maintained snapshot of the OBR Economic & Fiscal Outlook headline fiscal figures. Update on each OBR publication. Values are nominal GBP billions unless otherwise noted. Current entry is the March 2026 Spring Forecast (2026-03-03) — 23.6bn headroom, matching the seed timeline entry t_2026_03_03. Prior vintage was the March 2025 crunch (9.9bn). TODO(source): replace with OBR's 'headline data' CSV ingest once OBR exposes it via a stable URL.
